heroLead: At-home pet grooming for dogs and cats with simple package pricing, haircut options, and extras. Nails are free with any package.

serviceArea.summary: Based in Raeford, NC. In-home appointments available up to about 1 hour away.

about: Natasha’s Pet Grooming offers at-home pet grooming in a more personal, comfortable setting. Grooming is available for dogs and cats. Cats fall under the small package, and long-haired cats may have a de-matting fee added if they have a lot of mats. Puppy and kitten packages are also available.
booking: The easiest way to book is by phone or email. If you have questions about your pet, pricing, travel distance, pickup/drop-off, cats, kittens, puppies, bathing, or possible de-matting, just ask.
packageNotes: Cats fall under the small package.
Long-haired cats may have a de-matting fee added if needed.
individualServicesNote: Individual services are available too, but packages are usually the better deal.

extras.name: Pick/Drop
extras.note: may apply if more than 30 minutes away and both are needed

extras.name: De-mat only
extras.note: depends on how bad it is
